findings.title: AppProviders context ordering is correct but AIProvider depends on TaskContext
findings.detail: Provider order is: Settings > Task > Plugin > AI > Voice > Undo. AIProvider calls useTaskContext() (line 34 of AIContext.tsx), confirming it must be nested inside TaskProvider. This is correctly ordered. VoiceProvider is independent. UndoProvider is also independent. No issues found.
findings.impact: None — this is a clean pass confirmation.

findings.title: PERF-301 TODO: SettingsProvider makes ~52 individual API calls on mount
findings.detail: Already documented as TODO PERF-301 in the code. On mount, SettingsProvider calls `api.getAppSetting()` once per key (~52 keys). A single batch GET endpoint would reduce this to 1 request. This is a known issue and is explicitly annotated.
findings.impact: Low — only affects initial page load latency, settings are small.
